name: 終極身份懸念
description: 結尾揭露女主並非真正的富家千金，而是為母復仇的外來者，整個故事的前提被顛覆，觀眾被迫重新理解所有劇情。

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: Once there was a girl. She lived with her mother depending on each other until one day she saw her mother save her was hit by a car and killed. The girl begged everywhere wanting the murderer to be punished. ... I'm the daughter seeking justice for her mother.
